basic_details.job_title: NIT Raipur Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Technology Raipur (NIT Raipur)
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Raipur (NIT Raipur) Recruitment 2026: National Institute of Technology Raipur has released the official notification for 1 Project Assistant posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking research jobs.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: Maximum 35 years, but candidates above 35 years are eligible to apply.
age_limit.details: Maximum age limit is 35 years. Candidates above 35 years are also eligible to apply.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's in science with minimum 60% marks or 6.5 CGPA (out of 10). M.Sc. in Chemistry is preferrable.
qualification.details: Project Assistant: Bachelor's in science with minimum 60% marks or 6.5 CGPA (out of 10). M.Sc. in Chemistry is preferrable.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Raipur Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 05-08-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NIT Raipur Project Assistant Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the NIT Raipur Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download NIT Raipur Project Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: NIT Raipur Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
NIT Raipur Project Assistant Selection Process 2026
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Raipur Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 05-08-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NIT Raipur Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Project Assistant position at NIT Raipur?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application via email is 05 August 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated email address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Assistant role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Bachelor's degree in Science with a minimum of 60% marks or 6.5 CGPA (out of 10). An M.Sc. in Chemistry is preferred.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit is 35 years. However, candidates exceeding this age limit are also considered eligible to apply for this position.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 27,000/- per month, along with an additional 20% House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q5. How will the candidates be selected for the Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a walk-in interview, which may also be conducted in an online or hybrid format, as per the institute's discretion.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates are required to apply through email. The complete application form along with necessary documents should be sent to the specified email address.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the Project Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any application fee for this recruitment drive. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q8. What is the total number of vacancies for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Project Assistant position announced under this recruitment drive at NIT Raipur.

faq.question: Q9. What documents need to be submitted with the application?
faq.answer: Applicants must submit the duly filled application form, relevant mark sheets, certificates, age proof, research experience certificate (if any), and CV as a single PDF file.

faq.question: Q10. Where is NIT Raipur located?
faq.answer: National Institute of Technology Raipur is located in Raipur, Chhattisgarh, with the pincode 492010.
